value.0:
Terence McKenna

An explorer of the mind's furthest boundaries and the strangeness of existence. He moves through the Northern Forests of Ithilien, where strange things grow and stranger things are heard

Venture north and listen.

Joseph Campbell

A scholar of myth, archetype, and the hero's journey. He dwells in Balin's Tomb within Moria, where stories of sacrifice are carved in stone. 
Descend into that darkness to face him.

Marcus Aurelius

Roman Emperor and Stoic philosopher, who ruled an empire and kept his soul. He meditates in Gwathdor at the Throne of the Lord, where power and virtue meet their final test.

Seek him at that throne.

Jordan Peterson

A philosopher of order, meaning, and personal responsibility. He wanders the upper halls of Rivendell, where elven wisdom meets the weight of the world.

Seek him there and prove yourself worthy.

Alan Watts

A sage of Eastern philosophy and the nature of consciousness. He drifts through the Old Forest, where the ancient trees remember what mortals have forgotten.

Find him among those living shadows.

Jocko Willink

A warrior of extreme discipline and radical ownership. He holds the line at Helm's Deep, where every man stands or falls by their own choices.

Prove your discipline there.

Carl Jung

A cartographer of the unconscious and the shadow self. He broods in the Crypts of Esgaroth, where the darkness within is as real as the darkness without.

Confront him in that deep place.
